prompt_md: Your team is building a RAG assistant that answers questions about your own codebase and wiki. Arrange the six pipeline steps into the correct end-to-end order. Remember: the indexing steps (over the repo + wiki) must be done before any developer question can be answered, and at query time you must retrieve relevant context before the model generates its answer.

items: Augment the prompt by inserting the retrieved repo/wiki chunks as context
Chunk the repository and wiki into smaller passages
Generate the final answer from the augmented prompt
Embed each chunk into a vector
Embed the developer's question and retrieve the top-k most similar chunks
Store the chunk vectors in a vector index
